channel.title: Democratic Integrity on Asymmetric Intelligence
channel.description: Recent content in Democratic Integrity on Asymmetric Intelligence

item.title: World Democracy Monitor — 30 March 2026
item.description: Tisza leads Fidesz by 23 points with 13 days to Hungary’s April 12 election; Georgia’s new March 2026 law package completes its civil society capture architecture; and the Philippines enters the heatmap as a new Rapid Decay entry after CIVICUS adds it to its Watchlist at Repressed rating.
